aka: 第二次世界大戦の潜水艦(日)
trans_title: 第二次世界大戦の潜水艦(日)
introduction: WW2: Hell Under the Sea is an event-based series charting the stealth game of subsea warfare from contact to attack of the greatest submarine patrols of World War II. From the rise of the Wolfpack to the drive for victory in the Pacific, meet the masterminds who brought together the strategy, technology and tactics to make every sailor's worst nightmare to come to life.S3 E1 - Enigma CaptureS3 E2 - Commander DownS3 E3 - Killer StrikeS3 E4 - Torpedo RampageS3 E5 - The Longest JourneyS3 E6 - Iwo Jima Pilot Rescue
